🌅 Market News Digest
Jul 1, 2026 (EST)

🔥 Top Stories
• Wall St caps best quarter since 2020 — S&P 500 +0.8%, Nasdaq 100 +1.7% as AI/chips lead; futures later ease on rate concerns
• Trump crypto disclosure shocks markets — filing shows $1.2B+ crypto earnings, incl. $635M meme-coin/NFT royalties and $500M+ token-sale proceeds
• U.S.-Iran talks keep geopolitical risk in focus — Doha negotiations continue as Iran warns on Hormuz; oil and risk assets react

⛽ Oil & Energy
• API crude draw bigger than expected — crude -6.1M barrels, gasoline -2.1M; later Saudi Aramco sells spot barrels in Asia
• Hormuz tension persists — Iran says it wants control over the strait; vessel reported aground/approached in the area
• Oil prices stay soft, but IEA sees U.S. gas/coal capex rising — energy transition and power demand remain key themes

📊 Markets & Macro
• Asia rallies on Wall Street lead — Nikkei hits highs, Taiwan up 2%+, but KOSPI slides sharply on local weakness
• Japan Tankan beats forecasts — confidence strongest in years; capex plans solid, USD/JPY hits fresh 40-year high
• Eurozone inflation cools — June CPI 2.8% y/y, core 2.4%; traders trim ECB hike bets
• U.S. rates stay restrictive — Fed funds futures imply ~80% chance of September hike; Treasury yields hit one-week highs

🌍 Geopolitical
• Iran/Israel risk remains elevated — Netanyahu flags possible renewed confrontation; indirect U.S.-Iran talks continue in Doha
• NATO/Europe ramp defense messaging — Rutte and Merz stress long-term Ukraine aid, higher defense output, reduced U.S. dependence
• Middle East maritime risk rises — UKMTO reports vessel approached by multiple small craft in tense waters

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Trump and Vance crypto holdings disclosed — Trump reports $100M+ BTC/ETH, Vance holds $250K+ BTC; fuels policy/ethics scrutiny
• Bitcoin slips under $58K — long-term holder selling intensifies as risk sentiment weakens
• Taiwan passes crypto framework — clearer rules could boost digital-asset activity; South Korea also targets crypto whale abuse

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• U.S. lifts Anthropic export restrictions — Claude/Fable 5 access restored after safeguards; shows tighter AI review regime
• EU tightens trade/tech rules — e-commerce parcel fee hits Shein/Temu/Aliexpress; steel import quotas/duties also raised
• World Bank to phase out China lending — long-term shift in development financing and China exposure

🏢 Corporate
• Microsoft plans another layoff round — under 2.5% of workforce, reflecting continued cost discipline
• Nike warns on weak demand — softer store traffic and discretionary spending trigger a weaker outlook; BofA cuts target
• South32 sells aluminum assets to Alcoa — $5.6B deal, stock jumps on asset monetization and simplification
• Paramount offers remedies for Warner deal — EU deadline pushed to Jul 22 as antitrust concerns linger
